title: Simple Radio
description: This mod adds a simple radio you can use to communicate with your friends while far away!
body:
--- This mod is a plugin of Simple Voice Chat which adds radio communication over frequencies you can use to communicate with your friends while far away! ## Features ❌ - Unimplemented ✅ - Implemented ❓ - In Progress | Status | Feature | |--------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | ✅ | Radio item that transmits voice packets | | ✅ | Compile audio from nearby players as well | | ✅ | Additive transceiving | | ✅ | Radio block that can listen to frequencies and output audio from it | | ✅ | Microphone block that transmits audio of every player nearby | | ✅ | Packet transmission over frequencies instead of groups | | ✅ | Radiosmithing Station where the player can customize a radio | | ✅ | FM and AM transmission with benefits to each one | | ✅ | Dynamic audio filters for audio over radio, wherein audio gets less intelligible as it nears the range | | ❓ | Fully customizable config compatible with cloth config, etc. | | ❌ | Rechargable battery for transceivers | | ❓ | Radio upgrades that can increase range, improve audio quality, etc. | | ✅ | Transmitter block that transmits audio in conjunction with an antenna | | ✅ | Receiver block that can receive audio transmitted by transmitters, requires a speaker | | ✅ | Speaker block that can receive and play audio in conjunction with an receiver | | ✅ | Antennae that can increase transmitting/receiving range of a block | | ❌ | Weather and environmental interference | | ❌ | Altitude influences interference amount | | ❌ | Relay towers | | ❌ | Transmission mapping |
See the [roadmap](https://github.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio/wiki/Roadmap) to find out each features' progress and development priority! Check the [wiki](https://github.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio/wiki) for more information on the features of the mod! ## Supported Versions and Mod Loaders ❌ - Unsupported ✅ - Supported ❓ - Untested | Loader | 1.18.X | 1.19.X | 1.20.1 | 1.20.4 | 1.21.1 | |--------------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------| | **Fabric** | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | | **Quilt** | ❓ | ❓ | ❓ | ❓ | ❓ | | **Forge** | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ | | **NeoForge** | ❌ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ❌ |   ## Frequently Asked Questions ### Recipes aren't showing! There is currently an ongoing issue with recipes being inaccessible when using FFAPI, even if you aren't using it, you should try using the [FFAPI patch](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simple-radio-ffapi-patch) anyway. ### You should add X! If you have a feature request, check if it exists on the [roadmap](https://github.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio/wiki/Roadmap) already, or create a feature request on the [GitHub](https://github.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio/issues) if it doesn't exist yet. ### Can you port to X minecraft version? I have plans to port Simple Radio to every version that Simple Voice Chat supports for Forge and Fabric (eventually), this means versions as early as 1.12.2 all the way to recent versions of Minecraft. ### Can you port to X loader? Probably not. Each loader adds a heavy burden on development as I have to test it for each version as well as each loader for that version so that there aren't any issues with it (which there still ends up being anyway). But feel free to suggest it anyway and I can atleast consider it! # Related Projects | Project | Description | |--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | ![Simple Create Radios](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio/1.20.1/.related/simple_create_radios/icon.png) | [**Simple Create Radios**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-create-radios) [2.0-3.0]
This amazing resource pack aims to make the blocks and items fit aesthetically with the Create mod! | | ![Simple Radio Redone](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio/1.20.1/.related/simple_radio_redone/icon.png) | [**Simple Radio Redone**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-radio-redone) [2.0]
Another resource pack which remakes the textures of the mod to give it a fresh look while maintaining the original style! | | ![Simple Radio Reworked](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio/1.20.1/.related/simple_radio_reworked/icon.png) | [**Simple Radio Reworked**](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-radio-reworked) [2.0]
This resource pack gives a fresh view on the blocks and items to make them look more vanilla-friendly! | | ![Simple Frequency](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio/1.20.1/.related/simple_frequency/icon.png) | [**Simple Frequency**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simple-frequency) [2.0-3.0]
This datapack adds the ability to change the frequency and modulation of various Simple Radio items by using a simple command! | | ![Simple Radio Recreated](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/CodinGlitch/SimpleRadio/1.20.1/.related/simple_radio_recreated/icon.png) | [**Simple Radio Recreated**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simple-radio-recreated) [2.0-3.0]
This resourcepack redesigns blocks and items in the style of the Create mod! |
